description: Fix UniFFI binding issues in core/src/lib.rs to match the api.udl interface. Specifically: 1) Add missing get_privacy_config() method that serializes PrivacyConfig to JSON string. 2) Add missing relay_jitter_delay_ms() method that returns u64 milliseconds. 3) Fix type mismatches: prepare_onion_message should accept relay_public_keys as JSON string and deserialize it. 4) peel_onion_layer should accept relay_secret_key as Vec<u8> and convert to [u8; 32]. 5) set_privacy_config should accept config_json as string and deserialize it to PrivacyConfig struct.
expected_output: Fixed UniFFI binding issues in lib.rs with proper method signatures matching the UDL interface

description: Run cargo check to verify the fixes compile correctly
expected_output: Successful compilation with no UniFFI binding errors
